thinking.text:
The script is running and finding executed commands. But there are still issues with partial commands and OCR inaccuracies. Let me wait for it to finish to see the full list, then I can manually curate the commands based on the Zork game knowledge and visible sequences.

The commands being extracted seem mostly correct:
- n (north)
- u (up)
- get
- d (down)
- s (south)
- e (east)
- open
- w (west)
- get all
- move rug
- open case
- open trap
- light lamp
- slay troll
- g (again)
- get bag
- su (sw? or south?)
- se (southeast?)
- ulysse (actually "south" and "east" combined? No, "ulysses" - maybe OCR misreading)
- put all but lamp
- case
- temple
- Dopen solid (probably "open solid")
- get sharp
- pray
- put solid
- ease (probably "case")
- ne (northeast)

Some are OCR errors. Let me wait for the script to complete.
